description: Known affect-interaction templates. A template matches when both components appear among the emotion hypotheses. is_tension marks opposed valence/motivation.

templates.description: the language holds hope and fear together — reaching forward while braced against loss
love and grief are carried at once — closeness shadowed by loss
relief arrives still threaded with anxiety
joy appears alongside guilt — gladness that does not feel fully permitted
anger and sadness coexist — protest over a hurt that also grieves
hope and determination reinforce one another — a forward-leaning resolve
fear and anger move together — threat met with protest
